text: WarMonitor Starting a war without a plan is bad, but ending it just as blindly may be even worse. It tells adversaries like China they can walk all over this administration, and they’d be right. Axios: According to a source close to Trump, it appears that the president no longer wishes to use military force and has made the decision to end the war. - EndGameWW3 🇺🇸 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 在没有计划的情况下发动战争是不好的，但同样盲目地结束战争可能更糟。这告诉像中国这样的对手，他们可以随意践踏本届政府，而且他们是对的。Axios：据一位接近特朗普的消息人士称，总统似乎不再希望使用军事力量，并已决定结束战争。 - EndGameWW3 🇺🇸 推文

text: Open Source Intel French President Macron: Corporal Anicet Girardin of the 132nd Cynotechnical Infantry Regiment of Suippes, repatriated yesterday from Lebanon where he had been seriously wounded by Hezbollah fighters, died this morning from his injuries. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046957984727638226/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 法国总统马克龙：第132苏伊普犬科步兵团的下士阿尼塞·吉拉尔丁（Anicet Girardin）昨天从黎巴嫩被遣返回国，他在那里被真主党武装人员严重炸伤，今晨因伤势过重去世。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046957984727638226/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Steaming through the Strait of Hormuz and past the detained vessels Epaminodes and MSC Frencesca on its way towards the U.S. Naval blockade at the entrance of the Arabian Sea is the Iranian flagged crude oil tanker Atlantis II. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2046953142101676036/photo/1 Following reports that the Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps Navy (IRGC-N) seized two vessels today in the Strait of Hormuz, both vessels, the Epaminodes and the MSC Francesca can be viewed off the coast of Iran on MarineTraffic. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2046894116743589929/photo/1 - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 悬挂伊朗国旗的“亚特兰蒂斯二号”（Atlantis II）原油油轮正穿过霍尔木兹海峡，经过被扣押的“Epaminodes”号和“MSC Frencesca”号，驶向位于阿拉伯海入口处的美军海军封锁线。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2046953142101676036/photo/1 继有报道称伊斯兰革命卫队海军（IRGC-N）今天在霍尔木兹海峡扣押了两艘船只后，在MarineTraffic上可以看到这两艘船只（Epaminodes号和MSC Francesca号）位于伊朗海岸附近。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2046894116743589929/photo/1 - OSINTdefender 推文

text: Mouin Rabbani | Middle East Expert | Jadaliyya E-Magazine: Türkiye is not a militia unlike Hamas or Hezbollah, or a sanctioned state like Iran. It has a highly developed 21st century military with access to advanced weaponry from the US, the West & even Russia. Israel hasn't fought a war against an enemy with an Air Force since 1973 - over half a century ago. That would make a very substantial difference. Türkiye has a developed domestic military industry. Israel, as we've seen since 2023, is almost entirely dependent on foreign supply for weaponry, spare parts & ammunition. Türkiye is far less dependent on foreign resupply. That could become a key issue, particularly if the US chooses neutrality. FULL INTERVIEW
text_zh: Mouin Rabbani | 中东专家 | Jadaliyya电子杂志：土耳其与哈马斯或真主党不同，它不是民兵组织，也不是像伊朗那样受到制裁的国家。它拥有一支高度发达的21世纪军队，可以使用来自美国、西方甚至俄罗斯的先进武器。自1973年（半个多世纪前）以来，以色列还没有与拥有空军的敌人打过仗。这将产生非常实质性的差异。土耳其拥有发达的国内军事工业。正如我们自2023年以来所看到的那样，以色列在武器、备件和弹药方面几乎完全依赖外国供应。土耳其对外国补给的依赖程度要低得多。这可能成为一个关键问题，特别是如果美国选择中立的话。完整采访

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Breakfast Cereal General Kellogg would get rid of the current Iranian leadership as well. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Breakfast Cereal 凯洛格将军（General Kellogg）也会除掉目前的伊朗领导层。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iran has not yet announced an official position on extending the ceasefire Tasnim News reporter: ▪️ Despite reports circulating in some channels claiming “Iran’s official agreement to extend the ceasefire,” no official position has been announced by Iran so far. ▪️ The report attributed to the Foreign Ministry spokesperson in some news channels was inaccurate, which is why those same channels later removed the claim. ▪️ Esmaeil Baghaei, the Foreign Ministry spokesperson, did not say anything today about an “official agreement to a ceasefire.” ▪️ Iran is currently reviewing various aspects of Trump’s claim regarding the extension of the ceasefire. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗尚未就延长停火宣布官方立场 塔斯尼姆通讯社记者： ▪️ 尽管一些频道流传着声称“伊朗正式同意延长停火”的报道，但伊朗迄今尚未宣布任何官方立场。 ▪️ 一些新闻频道将该报道归因于外交部发言人是不准确的，这就是为什么这些频道后来删除了该说法。 ▪️ 外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊（Esmaeil Baghaei）今天没有就“正式同意停火”发表任何言论。 ▪️ 伊朗目前正在审查特朗普关于延长停火声明的各个方面。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇮🇱 Al-Akhbar: An Israeli jet has carried out an airstrike cutting off the road linking the towns of Haddatha and Tiri to prevent ambulance teams from reaching journalists Amal Khalil and Zainab Faraj. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 The Lebanese Red Cross team has made it to the town to evacuate the 2 journalists. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇮🇱 Al-Akhbar：一架以色列喷气式飞机发动了空袭，切断了连接哈达塔（Haddatha）和蒂里（Tiri）镇的道路，以阻止救护车队到达记者阿迈勒·哈利勒（Amal Khalil）和扎伊纳布·法拉杰（Zainab Faraj）身边。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩红十字会小组已到达该镇，撤离了这两名记者。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇳🇮🇱 Lebanese Minister of Information Paul Morcos: We are following up with UNIFIL and the Army Command regarding the incident involving the besiegement of journalists in the town of Tayri. We condemn the attack and hold Israel responsible for their…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 Medical sources to Al Jadeed: The Lebanese Red Cross is heading to evacuate journalist Amal Khalil from the southern town of Tayri, along with the two people who were targeted in the airstrike, after approval was granted by the Israeli army through the mechanism. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇳🇮🇱 黎巴嫩新闻部长保罗·莫科斯（Paul Morcos）：我们正在与联黎部队和陆军司令部跟进有关泰里（Tayri）镇记者被围困的事件。我们谴责这次袭击，并要求以色列对他们的……负责。” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 医疗消息人士告诉Al Jadeed：黎巴嫩红十字会正前往南部泰里（Tayri）镇撤离记者阿迈勒·哈利勒（Amal Khalil），以及在空袭中成为目标的另外两人，此前以色列军队已通过机制批准了该行动。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 Lebanese Minister of Information Paul Morcos: We are following up with UNIFIL and the Army Command regarding the incident involving the besiegement of journalists in the town of Tayri. We condemn the attack and hold Israel responsible for their safety. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩新闻部长保罗·莫科斯（Paul Morcos）：我们正在与联黎部队和陆军司令部跟进有关泰里（Tayri）镇记者被围困的事件。我们谴责这次袭击，并要求以色列对他们的安全负责。 @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from DD Geopolitics: 🇮🇷 At least 34 Iran-linked tankers and gas carriers have broken through the US naval blockade of Iranian ports, according to Bloomberg, citing data from analytics firm Vortexa. 19 vessels exited the Persian Gulf past the blockade line, 15 entered — crossing a cordon stretching from Oman's Ras al-Hadd coast northeast to the Iran-Pakistan border. The US Navy simply doesn't have enough ships on station to intercept and detain every vessel moving in and out of Iranian ports. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 DD Geopolitics：🇮🇷 据彭博社援引分析公司 Vortexa 的数据，至少有 34 艘与伊朗有关的油轮和天然气运输船突破了美国对伊朗港口的封锁。19 艘船只穿过封锁线离开波斯湾，15 艘船只进入——穿越了从阿曼拉斯哈德海岸向东北延伸至伊朗-巴基斯坦边境的警戒线。美国海军根本没有足够的驻守舰艇来拦截和扣押每一艘进出伊朗港口的船只。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇫🇷🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇳 French President Emmanuel Macron announced that another UNIFIL troop has passed away following his wounds. Corporal Anicet Girardin of the 132nd Cynotechnical Infantry Regiment of Suippes, repatriated yesterday from Lebanon where he had been seriously…" ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 French Minister of the Armed Forces Catherine Vautrin announced that Corporal Chief Anicet Girardin of the 132nd Cynotechnical Infantry Regiment has died of his wounds after being shot by Hezbollah fighters in southern Lebanon. He was serving with UNIFIL in Operation Daman, alongside Adjutant Florian Montorio, who was killed earlier this week. Girardin was attempting to open a route booby-trapped with an IED when the patrol came under heavy fire. He was hit while trying to help his fallen element leader; he was evacuated but succumbed to his injuries. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇫🇷🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇳 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙宣布，又有一名联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（联黎部队）士兵因伤去世。来自叙普第 132 警犬步兵团的下士阿尼塞·吉拉尔丁（Anicet Girardin）昨天从黎巴嫩被遣返回国，他在那里受了重伤……” ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 法国武装部队部长凯瑟琳·沃特林宣布，第 132 警犬步兵团的下士长阿尼塞·吉拉尔丁在黎巴嫩南部被真主党武装人员射击后，因伤势过重不治身亡。他当时正随联黎部队执行“达曼行动”（Operation Daman），与本周早些时候阵亡的弗洛里安·蒙托里奥（Florian Montorio）准尉一同服役。吉拉尔丁在试图开辟一条被简易爆炸装置（IED）布雷的路线时，巡逻队遭到了猛烈火力攻击。他在试图帮助倒下的分队指挥官时中弹；他被撤离后因伤势过重而死亡。 @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from КАВКАЗАРЬ: 📝 По минному полю 📝 о развитии азербайджано-украинского взаимодействия Координация между властями Азербайджана и т.н. Украины продолжается. Украинцы посетили свое посольство в Баку , где обсудили продолжение сотрудничества с азербайджанским агентством по разминированию ANAMA . Речь шла о практической реализации меморандума, подписанного руководством стран в прошлом году и предусматривающего обучение специалистов, обмен опытом и развитие совместных программ по разминированию. 🖍 Контакты по этой линии идут не первый год и постепенно расширяются. К обучению и консультациям добавляются поставки техники, совместные проекты и регулярное взаимодействие профильных структур. ❗️ Разминирование выступает устойчивым направлением сотрудничества, завязанным на военные и инженерные компетенции. Подобная работа укрепляет уже сложившуюся линию взаимодействия между руководством стран, где «гуманитарная» повестка используется как основа для более широкого партнерства, в том числе военного . В Баку, очевидно, уже давно сделали свой выбор. #Азербайджан #Украина 🗻 @caucasar – не думай о Кавказе свысока 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 КАВКАЗАРЬ：📝 在雷区上 📝 关于阿塞拜疆与乌克兰互动的发展 阿塞拜疆当局与所谓乌克兰之间的协调仍在继续。乌克兰人访问了其驻巴库大使馆，讨论了与阿塞拜疆排雷机构（ANAMA）继续合作的事宜。讨论内容涉及落实两国领导人去年签署的谅解备忘录，该备忘录规定了专家培训、经验交流以及开展联合排雷项目。 🖍 这一领域的联系已经持续多年，并正在逐步扩大。除了培训和咨询外，还增加了设备供应、联合项目以及相关部门之间的定期互动。 ❗️ 排雷是合作的一个稳定方向，与军事和工程能力挂钩。此类工作加强了已经建立的两国领导层之间的互动路线，其中“人道主义”议程被用作更广泛伙伴关系（包括军事伙伴关系）的基础。在巴库，显然早已做出了选择。 #阿塞拜疆 #乌克兰 🗻 @caucasar – 不要小看高加索 💸 支持我们

text: French President Macron: Corporal Anicet Girardin of the 132nd Cynotechnical Infantry Regiment of Suippes, repatriated yesterday from Lebanon where he had been seriously wounded by Hezbollah fighters, died this morning from his injuries.
text_zh: 法国总统马克龙：来自叙普第 132 警犬步兵团的下士阿尼塞·吉拉尔丁（Anicet Girardin）昨天从黎巴嫩被遣返回国，他在那里被真主党武装人员严重炸伤，于今天早上因伤势过重去世。

text: Visioner 🇨🇳 🇹🇼 China's Ministry of Foreign Affairs on Taiwan: There is but one China in the world; Taiwan is an inalienable part of China’s territory. It’s very clear that there’s no longer a so-called “ROC president” in the world anymore. Anyone who wears that false title is acting against history and will only invite disgrace upon themselves. The one-China principle is where the arc of history bends and public opinion trends, and to uphold it is the right thing to do. No one can ever stop the eventual reunification of China. The separatist attempts aimed at Taiwan independence are just futile and doomed to fail. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇨🇳 🇹🇼 中国外交部就台湾问题表示：世界上只有一个中国，台湾是中国领土不可分割的一部分。很明显，世界上已经没有所谓的“中华民国总统”了。任何顶着这个虚假头衔的人都是在逆历史潮流而动，只会自取其辱。一个中国原则是历史大势，是人心所向，坚持一个中国原则是正义之举。中国终将实现完全统一，任何人无法阻挡。任何旨在搞“台独”的分裂图谋都是徒劳的，注定失败。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesperson to BBC: Iran has not yet decided whether it will join the next round of talks with the U.S. late this week in Islamabad. "If we reach the conclusion that going to Islamabad serves our national interests, we will go there." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046950675964174485/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗外交部发言人对BBC表示：伊朗尚未决定是否参加本周晚些时候在伊斯兰堡举行的下一轮美伊会谈。“如果我们得出结论认为前往伊斯兰堡符合我们的国家利益，我们就会去。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046950675964174485/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Ukrainian personnel have arrived at Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia to train U.S. soldiers on Sky Map, a Ukrainian-developed counter-drone command and control system. The base has been repeatedly hit by Iranian attacks. - Reuters tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 乌克兰人员已抵达沙特阿拉伯苏丹亲王空军基地，对美军士兵进行“天图”（Sky Map）系统的培训，这是一款由乌克兰开发的无人机反制指挥控制系统。该基地曾多次遭到伊朗袭击。- 路透社 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran has not yet decided to hold discussions on Friday, according to Tasnim. Trump to NYP: Iran talks ‘possible’ as soon as FRIDAY. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 据塔斯尼姆通讯社报道，伊朗尚未决定在周五举行会谈。特朗普对《纽约邮报》表示：伊朗会谈“可能”最早于周五举行。- Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump to NYP: Iran talks ‘possible’ as soon as FRIDAY. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普对《纽约邮报》表示：伊朗会谈“可能”最早于周五举行。推文

text: China's Foreign Ministry on Taiwan: There is but one China in the world. Taiwan is an inalienable part of China’s territory. No one can stop the eventual reunification of China. Reunification is presented as a matter of inevitability, not possibility. Separatist attempts aimed at Taiwan independence are futile and doomed to fail.
text_zh: 中国外交部就台湾问题表示：世界上只有一个中国。台湾是中国领土不可分割的一部分。中国终将实现完全统一，任何人无法阻挡。统一被视为必然，而非可能。任何旨在搞“台独”的分裂图谋都是徒劳的，注定失败。

text: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇳 French President Emmanuel Macron announced that another UNIFIL troop has passed away following his wounds. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇳 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙宣布，又有一名联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（联黎部队）士兵因伤去世。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump announced: A second round of talks with Iran could take place by Friday, with a potential breakthrough in negotiations possible within 36 to 72 hours. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普宣布：第二轮与伊朗的会谈可能在周五前举行，谈判有望在36至72小时内取得突破。@wfwitness

text: Former Captain in Israeli Intelligence force, Ella Kenan: We reached close to 3 billion views. We work with communities of over 60,000 people worldwide. They say genocide — we explain why it’s not. They say apartheid — we explain why it’s not. We introduced ‘Hamas is ISIS’ — and explained why. In three to four days, it became the most viewed narrative online. It stayed viral globally for almost three months. We create content for non-Jewish influencers as well. We help report antisemitic rhetoric and fake news. We actively work to take harmful content down.
text_zh: 前以色列情报部队上尉埃拉·凯南（Ella Kenan）：我们的浏览量接近30亿次。我们与全球超过6万人的社区合作。他们说是种族灭绝——我们解释为什么不是。他们说是种族隔离——我们解释为什么不是。我们提出了“哈马斯就是ISIS”——并解释了原因。在三到四天内，这成为了网上浏览量最高的叙事。它在全球范围内保持了近三个月的病毒式传播。我们也为非犹太裔网红创作内容。我们帮助举报反犹太言论和假新闻。我们积极致力于删除有害内容。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli jets over southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列战机飞越黎巴嫩南部上空。@wfwitness

text: Macron: a French soldier from the United Nations mission in Lebanon has died from his wounds ✍ Second casualty from the clash in Ghandourieh.
text_zh: 马克龙：一名来自联合国驻黎巴嫩特派团的法国士兵因伤去世 ✍ 这是甘杜里耶（Ghandourieh）冲突中的第二名伤亡人员。

text: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🌐 Turkish President Erdoğan met with NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte in Ankara, Turkey. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🌐 土耳其总统埃尔多安在土耳其安卡拉会见了北约秘书长马克·吕特。@wfwitness

text: The White House is drafting a tiered list ranking NATO members based on support for U.S. actions, especially the Iran war. Allies seen as “model” could receive benefits, while others may face consequences like reduced troop presence or cooperation. Source: POLITICO
text_zh: 白宫正在起草一份分级名单，根据北约成员国对美国行动（特别是伊朗战争）的支持程度进行排名。被视为“模范”的盟友可能会获得利益，而其他盟友可能会面临减少驻军或合作等后果。来源：POLITICO

text: Trump said “good news” on renewed U.S.–Iran talks could come “as soon as Friday,” adding in a message: “It’s possible!” Source: New York Post
text_zh: 特朗普表示，关于重启美伊会谈的“好消息”可能“最早在周五”到来，并补充道：“有可能！”来源：《纽约邮报》

text: ⚡ 🇫🇮 Finnish Air Force cadets are under investigation after aircraft from a training mission on April 13 traced a penis-shaped flight pattern visible on tracking platforms. The Finnish Air Force said the cadets were part of a training course and that the conduct violated standards, though the flights remained within designated airspace. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇫🇮 芬兰空军学员正在接受调查，此前他们在4月13日的一次训练任务中，飞行轨迹在追踪平台上显示出了阴茎形状。芬兰空军表示，这些学员是培训课程的一部分，这种行为违反了标准，尽管飞行仍在指定空域内进行。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel NATO Secretary General Rutte in Türkiye: "NATO will always do what is necessary to defend Türkiye and all allies." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046943391456416247/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 北约秘书长吕特在土耳其表示：“北约将始终采取必要行动，保卫土耳其及所有盟友。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046943391456416247/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Russia is preparing to stop shipments of Kazakh oil to Germany, putting at risk a refinery that provides about 90% of the petrol, kerosene, and heating fuel for Berlin, its airport, and the surrounding area. (FT) tweet
text_zh: 战争监测 俄罗斯正准备停止向德国输送哈萨克斯坦石油，这将危及一家为柏林及其机场和周边地区提供约90%汽油、煤油和取暖燃料的炼油厂。（金融时报）推文

text: OSINTtechnical The US has deployed a Ukrainian counter-drone system to help defend an airbase in Saudi Arabia repeatedly hit by Iranian attacks -Reuters Ukrainian personnel recently arrived Prince Sultan Airbase to train US soldiers on Sky Map, a Ukrainian-developed command and control system. tweet
text_zh: 开源技术 美国已部署一套乌克兰反无人机系统，以帮助保卫沙特阿拉伯的一个空军基地，该基地此前多次遭到伊朗袭击——路透社 乌克兰人员最近抵达苏丹王子空军基地，对美国士兵进行“天空地图”（Sky Map）培训，这是一种由乌克兰开发的指挥与控制系统。推文

text: Open Source Intel Former U.S. Secretary of State John Kerry on the Iran war: "This war did not have to be fought. The greatest duty of a president is to look into the eyes of parents of young people you're sending to war. You must make clear there is a purpose, a clarity, and defined goals. You must know what you are asking people to sacrifice for. That did not happen here. This is a failed test of the presidency." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国前国务卿约翰·克里谈及伊朗战争：“这场战争本不必发生。总统最大的职责是直视那些被送上战场的年轻人的父母的眼睛。你必须明确指出战争的目的、清晰度和既定目标。你必须知道你要求人们为之牺牲的是什么。但这里并没有做到。这是总统任期内的一次失败考验。”推文

text: Open Source Intel Israel's Ambassador to Germany Ron Prosor: "If a Jew is beaten because he is a Jew, how is that not antisemitism? 'Don't buy from Israel' means 'Don't buy from Jews.'" https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046938668682674449/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列驻德国大使罗恩·普罗索尔：“如果一个犹太人因为是犹太人而遭到殴打，这怎么能不是反犹主义呢？‘不要购买以色列产品’就意味着‘不要购买犹太人的产品’。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046938668682674449/video/1 推文

text: 🇮🇷 At least 34 Iran-linked tankers and gas carriers have broken through the US naval blockade of Iranian ports, according to Bloomberg, citing data from analytics firm Vortexa. 19 vessels exited the Persian Gulf past the blockade line, 15 entered — crossing a cordon stretching from Oman's Ras al-Hadd coast northeast to the Iran-Pakistan border. The US Navy simply doesn't have enough ships on station to intercept and detain every vessel moving in and out of Iranian ports. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 据彭博社援引分析公司Vortexa的数据显示，至少有34艘与伊朗有关的油轮和天然气运输船突破了美国对伊朗港口的封锁。19艘船只驶出波斯湾越过封锁线，15艘船只进入——穿越了从阿曼拉斯哈德海岸向东北延伸至伊朗-巴基斯坦边境的警戒线。美国海军在岗舰艇数量不足，无法拦截和扣押每一艘进出伊朗港口的船只。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Visioner 🚨 Become a member of the Visioner community and be the first to learn about ongoing military and geopolitical events around the world. https://twitter.com/i/communities/1950553007629722076 tweet

text_zh: 战争翻译 图阿普谢那边还在燃烧。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2046938206621274547/video/1 推文

text: 🇮🇷 But Trump said Iran has no cards... 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 但特朗普说伊朗手里没有牌了…… 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah announced that In response to Israeli violations, they targeted the newly established artillery position in the town of Al-Bayyada using an attack drone. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党宣布，为回应以色列的违规行为，他们使用攻击型无人机瞄准了位于Al-Bayyada镇新建立的炮兵阵地。 @wfwitness

text: ❗️ Injuries not yet evacuated from Al-Tiri ❗️ A drone strike targeted Yuhmor al-Shuqayf, resulting in 4 injuries
text_zh: ❗️ Al-Tiri的伤员尚未撤离 ❗️ 一次无人机袭击瞄准了Yuhmor al-Shuqayf，造成4人受伤

text: ⚡ 🇪🇺 🇮🇷 LuxTimes: The European Union has proposed additional energy measures to mitigate the impact of the ongoing Iran-related crisis, focusing on stabilizing supply and reducing market volatility. The measures include coordination between member states, potential use of strategic reserves, and efforts to diversify energy sources to offset disruptions linked to tensions around the Strait of Hormuz. The EU aims to shield its economy from further shocks as the conflict continues to impact global energy flows and supply chains. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇪🇺 🇮🇷 卢森堡时报：欧盟已提出额外的能源措施，以减轻持续的伊朗相关危机的影响，重点在于稳定供应和降低市场波动。这些措施包括成员国之间的协调、潜在的战略储备使用，以及努力实现能源来源多样化，以抵消与霍尔木兹海峡周边紧张局势相关的中断。随着冲突继续影响全球能源流动和供应链，欧盟旨在保护其经济免受进一步冲击。 @wfwitness

text: Iran Seizes Two Ships Despite US Attack Pause Iran seized two ships & fired on others after Trump halted attacks but maintained a naval blockade. Mediation efforts by Pakistan have stalled amid persistent tension. READ MORE
text_zh: 尽管美国暂停袭击，伊朗仍扣押两艘船只 在特朗普停止袭击但维持海军封锁后，伊朗扣押了两艘船只并向其他船只开火。在持续的紧张局势下，巴基斯坦的调解努力陷入停滞。阅读更多

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli drone strike on Yuhmor Al shuqayaf which resulted in 4 injuries. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列对Yuhmor Al shuqayaf发动无人机袭击，造成4人受伤。 @wfwitness

text: NATO's Rutte in Türkiye: NATO will always do what is necessary to defend Türkiye and all allies.
text_zh: 北约的吕特在土耳其：北约将始终采取必要行动，以捍卫土耳其及所有盟友。

text: WarTranslated Bloomberg reports that Ukraine has requested Turkey's assistance in organizing a high-level meeting between President Zelenskyy and Putin as part of efforts to end the war. "We have reached out to Turkey directly. But if another capital - other than Moscow or Belarus - organizes such a meeting, we will attend it... We are also advocating for a meeting to be held now to give new momentum to the Zelenskyy-Putin diplomatic track." - stated Foreign Minister Andrii Sybiha. https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-04-22/ukraine-says-it-asked-turkey-to-help-seek-zelenskiy-putin-talks tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated Bloomberg 报道称，乌克兰已请求土耳其协助组织泽连斯基总统与普京之间的高级别会晤，作为结束战争努力的一部分。“我们已直接联系了土耳其。但如果除莫斯科或白俄罗斯以外的另一个首都组织这样的会议，我们将参加……我们还主张现在就举行会议，为泽连斯基与普京的外交轨道注入新的动力。”——外交部长安德烈·西比哈表示。https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-04-22/ukraine-says-it-asked-turkey-to-help-seek-zelenskiy-putin-talks 推文

text: Open Source Intel Two killed in an Israeli strike on a vehicle in the village of Al-Tiri in southern Lebanon's Nabatieh district. - Lebanese News Agency tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列对黎巴嫩南部纳巴泰省 Al-Tiri 村的一辆汽车发动袭击，造成两人死亡。——黎巴嫩通讯社 推文

text: Open Source Intel Former U.S. Secretary of State John Kerry: "Netanyahu presented the Iran War case to us too. The response was no. The prediction was regime change, that people would rise up. None of that happened. Obama said no. Bush said no. Biden said no. We were lied to about what that war was about. The lesson of Vietnam and Iraq is: don't lie to the American people. Don't ask them to send their sons and daughters to fight." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国前国务卿约翰·克里：“内塔尼亚胡也曾向我们提出过伊朗战争的理由。我们的回答是拒绝。当时的预测是政权更迭，人民会起义。但这些都没有发生。奥巴马说不。布什说不。拜登说不。关于那场战争的真正目的，我们被骗了。越南战争和伊拉克战争的教训是：不要对美国人民撒谎。不要要求他们送自己的儿女去打仗。” 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Ukrainian FPV drone chases a pair of Russian soldiers who attempted to avoid being hit by jumping into a water body. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2046936173600256040/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 乌克兰 FPV 无人机追逐两名俄罗斯士兵，他们试图通过跳入水体来躲避打击。https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2046936173600256040/video/1 推文
